message:
test(vc_export): add proptest suite + fix clippy lints under --features vc-export

- Add proptest_vc_export.rs: 21 property tests for SessionTelemetry and
  AgentMetrics serde roundtrip, forward compatibility (extra HashMap
  fields), RobotEnvelope wrapping, degraded envelope, and default
  invariants.
- Fix robot_envelope.rs: derive Eq alongside PartialEq
  (derive_partial_eq_without_eq lint)
- Fix vc_export.rs: replace assert_eq!(f64, 0.0) with tolerance
  comparison (float_cmp lint)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
